metadata.description: Workflow plugins for Claude Code: external LLM CLI wrappers, QA reviewer subagent, and session-handoff prep.

plugins.name: claude-reviewer
plugins.description: QA reviewer subagent and /claude-reviewer:qa skill that catches miscounts, duplicates, stale totals, hallucinations, and internal contradictions in AI-generated output

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Wraps the Codex CLI as an independent analysis partner — /codex:codex skill for brainstorm, red-team, debug, plan-review, diff-review, and other modes

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Wraps the Gemini CLI as an independent analysis partner from a different model family — /gemini:gemini skill for brainstorm, red-team, diff-review, and other modes

plugins.name: prep-compact
plugins.description: Warm-handoff sidecar that drafts tailored /compact instructions when the context window fills. A Stop hook maintains an on-disk handoff JSON; the /prep-compact skill reads it and adds an analytical layer (decisions, constraints, blockers, next-step).
